name: court-reporting-workspace
description: Root workspace to run backend + frontend together for testing

scripts.install:all: pnpm --dir backend install && pnpm --dir frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "pnpm --dir backend run start:dev" "pnpm --dir frontend run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --dir backend run build && pnpm --dir frontend run build
scripts.test: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "pnpm --dir backend run test" "pnpm --dir frontend run test"
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir backend run lint && pnpm --dir frontend run lint
